user.title: Add WattWächter Plus
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your WattWächter device. The API token is optional if authentication is disabled on the device.

zeroconf_confirm.title: WattWächter Plus discovered

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WattWächter Plus
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your WattWächter device.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate WattWächter Plus
reauth_confirm.description: The API token for WattWächter {device_id} ({host}) is invalid or expired. Please enter a new token.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Please check the IP address and make sure the device is powered on.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check your token and try again.

abort.already_configured: This device is already configured. The IP address has been updated.
abort.already_configured_mqtt: This device is already integrated via MQTT auto-discovery. Please disable MQTT on the device or remove the MQTT entities first to use this integration instead.

firmware_update_auth.message: Cannot start firmware update: WRITE API token required.
